pattern: Simulate with a stack of surviving asteroids; a left-moving asteroid collides only against right-moving ones already on top, resolving by magnitude.
hints: Collisions happen only when a right-moving asteroid is immediately followed by a left-moving one.
Process left to right with a stack of survivors.
A negative asteroid keeps destroying smaller positive tops; it dies on equal magnitude and is pushed only if no positive remains to stop it.

edge_inputs.description: left asteroid clears several positives then continues
leading lefts pass before rights appear

stress.description: random nonzero asteroids of mixed direction
